Off Calendar Sep-11-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: rachel doughty, esq., greenfire law, 828.333.4703, specially appearing for plaintiff anthony held; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement is Granted. No opposition filed. The settlement complies with Proposition 65. Order signed in open Court. judgment signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
